desc:
Forest Treasure Map #10 dig site: This treasure can be found near Greggs Mine Supply, southeast of Vault 76. If you enter the city from the south, stop and turn right towards the river. Look down the river as it goes narrow on the rocks just above the river sits a yellow pickup truck above on the street. You see the mound with treasure on a ledge in the river.
Grid E6 (X: 1873.3, Y: 2344.2)
Submitted By MrCrazy
